Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc 311 upvotes, 25 comments
  2. Z80 Sans – a disassembler in a font (2024) 87 upvotes, 10 comments
  3. FrameBook 382 upvotes, 65 comments
  4. Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life 80 upvotes, 9 comments
  5. LibreOffice Writer now supports Markdown 302 upvotes, 54 comments
  6. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 418 upvotes, 95 comments
  7. Pushing and Pulling: Three reactivity algorithms 82 upvotes, 15 comments
  8. What if the Apple ][ had run on Field-Sequential? 83 upvotes, 16 comments
  9. PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug 94 upvotes, 19 comments
  10. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 127 upvotes, 32 comments
  11. Linux Internals: How /proc/self/mem writes to unwritable memory (2021) 47 upvotes, 10 comments
  12. Lil Finder Guy 88 upvotes, 26 comments
  13. Case Study: lynnandtonic.com 2025 refresh 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  14. Notes on writing Rust-based Wasm 215 upvotes, 90 comments
  15. Show HN: I built a real-time OSINT dashboard pulling 15 live global feeds 191 upvotes, 86 comments
  16. I made a programming language with M&Ms 57 upvotes, 21 comments
  17. We should revisit literate programming in the agent era 177 upvotes, 95 comments
  18. WSL Manager 81 upvotes, 46 comments
  19. The legendary Mojave Phone Booth is back (2013) 14 upvotes, 4 comments
  20. Blacksky AppView 113 upvotes, 72 comments
  21. Ask HN: How to be alone? 333 upvotes, 244 comments
  22. Ask HN: Please restrict new accounts from posting 501 upvotes, 385 comments
  23. Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019) 188 upvotes, 133 comments
  24. My Homelab Setup 173 upvotes, 129 comments
  25. Show HN: Skir – like Protocol Buffer but better 65 upvotes, 42 comments
  26. My “grand vision” for Rust 140 upvotes, 121 comments
  27. Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video] 159 upvotes, 150 comments
  28. Last Statements 15 upvotes, 9 comments
  29. Show HN: Reviving a 20-year-old puzzle game Chromatron with Ghidra and AI 3 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (March 2026) 75 upvotes, 229 comments

Last generated 12:30pm, 9 March 2026. Source here.
